content.en:
Another time passed.

The Heavenly Venerable had completely adapted to this resurrected body, and had turned the results of his own research in countless Ultimate Epochs into his own strength.

Now, his strength has surpassed the past, and his self-confidence has skyrocketed.

"Guantian Extreme Venerable, we can deal with that Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable!"

Zhangtian Jizun found Guantian Jizun and said.

"Yes!"

Guantian is extremely respectful, and at the same time full of expectations.

For a long time, he didn't dare to leave the Guantian Holy Mountain, nor did he dare to provoke the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, but now that the Heavenly Supreme Venerable has returned from resurrection, he has the confidence.

Moreover, he also has the ultimate oath bound by the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, so he will not worry about the Palm Heaven Extreme Zun killing him.

Whew!!!

A group of Ultimate Realm Masters followed the Heaven Viewing Extreme Venerable and the Palm Heaven Supreme Venerable, shuttling through the void of the Dimensional Sea, going to the Terran Territory to kill the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable Ye Tian.

......

"A group of Ultimate Realm Masters are here!"

Ye Tian's gaze passed through the infinite territory and spied on that group of Ultimate Realm Lords, after all, his current strength had reached an extremely terrifying level, if there was an enemy who wanted to deal with him, he would naturally be able to detect it.

"Heaven Watching Extreme Venerable!"

"There's also a strange Peerless-level Ultimate Realm Master!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, the Sea of Dimensions actually had an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, even in the Ultimate Land, Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lords were very rare and not easy to see, and how could the Sea of Dimensions cultivate an Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord?

Even if he kept hanging up, if he didn't go to the Ultimate Land, he wouldn't be able to break through to the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord in the Sea of Dimensions, and no matter how much time he had, he wouldn't be able to.

This is not a matter of innate qualifications, it is a matter of the environment of heaven and earth, and there is no environment for the growth of the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord here.

What's more, he could see at a glance that the strength of this Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord was much stronger than other Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lords, almost reaching the limit of an Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord.

"This Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord should have come out of the Ultimate Land!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After a few breaths, this group of Ultimate Realm Masters can reach the Terran Realm.

As a result, Ye Tian's body moved, intercepting these Ultimate Realm Lords, lest conflicts break out and affect other races.

......

When the Heavenly Venerable saw Ye Tian, he immediately stopped, and the Heavenly Venerable also stopped.

Then.

Ye Tian learned the name of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable through the snooping of the copy talent.

"Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Isn't the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable the Ultimate Extreme Venerable in the Legend of the Dimensional Sea? He hadn't seen the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, and he thought that the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was really the Ultimate Extreme Venerable!

But now, I know that the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable is not the ultimate Extreme Venerable at all, but an Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord.

"From this point of view, the original Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was able to come out of the Ultimate Land, which was another method to use, and the Ultimate Realm Lords of the Dimension Sea still thought that the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was really the Ultimate Extreme Venerable!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, do you know me?"

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was a little surprised.

"How famous is the Heavenly Celestial Venerable, I naturally know you. Ye Tian said lightly.

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable smiled slightly and said: "Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, you have grown up very fast, and you can break through to the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord so quickly, I am afraid that you have a special treasure on your body, give me that treasure, I can promise not to kill you." "

"Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable ......"

Guantian Jizun shouted.

He felt that he couldn't let go of Ye Tian, what if Ye Tian broke through to the ultimate supreme in the future, then today's matter would be troublesome, and Ye Tian would definitely not let them go.

Therefore, Ye Tian must be killed.

But Zhangtian Jizun ignored Guantian Jizun, he had his own ideas.

"Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, do you think I have amazing treasures on me? Not to mention whether there is one, and even if there is, why should I give it to you? If you are the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, then you might as well give it to you, but you are just an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, and you also threaten me?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable has made a move, and as soon as he makes a move, it is an ultimate arcane art!

"The Ultimate Arcane - Heavenly Hand!"

Rumble!!!!

This side of the void was all encompassed by the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, and the power of this blow shocked the Guantian Extreme Venerable and the others with ultimate precision, and they felt like ants under this blow.

However.

In an instant, a ray of light tore through the Palm Heaven Hand, and even a piece of the Ultimate Void was pierced, causing the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable to tremble, revealing a look of shock.

"You'll also be able to achieve ultimate arcane, something remarkable!"

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable Dao.

In an instant, the sword of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable's body, and the terrifying aura made the Guantian Extreme Venerable unable to bear it, and they retreated back for a long time.

"Kill!"

Zhangtian Jizun killed Ye Tian, and he wanted to go all out to kill Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was not polite either, he burst out with the ultimate body of ten thousand laws, and then cast the ultimate arcane technique of breaking the void with one hand.

597 Boom !!!

All of the attacks and defenses of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable were instantly shattered by the Ultimate Arcane Void Break, and even his body was pierced by the Void Break.

Then, Ye Tian unleashed the ultimate arcane technique of the Will Killing Sword, which directly severely damaged the ultimate will of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable.

"How can this be ......"

The Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable was stunned.

He thought that he could kill many top Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords in the Ultimate Land in an instant, and he was the oldest Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, even older than some Ultimate Ultimate Lords.

No matter how strong his strength is, he has never been defeated by a strong person of the same level, and he has crushed the existence of the same level along the way.

But now, he was easily crushed by Ye Tian.

"Create your own ultimate path, and your ultimate path is stronger and more perfect than the ultimate path of an ultimate supreme person I have ever befriended. The ultimate arcane art you have created is also extremely terrifying, and the ultimate will is also extremely powerful, an existence like yours can easily break through to the ultimate supreme, why don't you go and attack the ultimate supreme?"

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable asked unwillingly.

If Ye Tian impacted the Ultimate Extreme Venerable and became the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, where would he dare to kill Ye Tian, it would be too late to please him, and he would even choose to take refuge in Ye Tian!

Remorseful!

That's how he feels right now!
